channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Study Links Sleep Deprivation to Health Risks
item.description: A 'rise and grind' work culture may pose a public health risk, potentially costing the U.S. billions annually.

item.title: United Airlines plane avoids major incident at Newark airport
item.description: A Boeing 767 from Venice landed safely at Newark after striking a truck and light pole.

item.title: GameStop Considers eBay Acquisition, Analysts Express Concerns
item.description: Ryan Cohen proposes a merger that could significantly increase eBay's value, though experts remain skeptical.

item.title: Judge questions White House dinner shooter's suicide watch placement
item.description: Cole Tomas Allen alleged unnecessary confinement, searches and restraints while in a padded room.
